title: A Monster Calls
tmdbOverview: 12-year-old Conor encounters an ancient tree monster who proceeds to help him cope with his mother's terminal illness and being bullied in school.
synopsis: A Monster Calls is a 2016 fantasy, adventure and family film from Spain and United States. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
